task_completion.description: Verify that the OpenBCI GUI is set to Playback mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'PLAYBACK' selected as the data source in the System Control panel at the top left or center of the OpenBCI GUI.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct EEG recording file is selected for playback.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the filename 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt' visible in the file selection area of the Playback configuration in the System Control panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Networking widget is open in the GUI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a widget panel titled 'Networking' visible in the main grid interface of the OpenBCI GUI.

task_completion.description: Verify that the UDP protocol is selected in the Networking widget.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'UDP' selected in the protocol dropdown menu within the Networking widget.

task_completion.description: Verify that the port is set to 12345 in the Networking widget.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the number '12345' entered into the port configuration text field within the Networking widget.

task_completion.description: Verify that the network stream has been started.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the stream control button in the Networking widget indicating an active state (e.g., the button says 'Stop' or 'Stop Stream', or there is a visual indicator that streaming is active).

task_completion.description: Verify that the main data playback has been started.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for EEG data actively scrolling across the Time Series graphs and the main system control button at the top left showing 'Stop Data Stream' instead of 'Start Data Stream'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the OpenBCI GUI application to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenBCI GUI application window must be visible and properly configured, not just a text editor showing the configuration file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands to fake the UDP stream.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check visible terminal windows for commands like 'nc', 'socat', or python scripts designed to spoof UDP packets on port 12345. The stream must originate from the OpenBCI GUI.

integrity.description: Ensure the EEG data being played back appears genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Time Series widget should display multiple channels (up to 8) of fluctuating EEG data, consistent with a real recording, rather than a static image or empty graphs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring OpenBCI GUI v5.2.2. The correct file to load in Playback mode is 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt' located in '~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/'. The Networking widget must be configured for the 'UDP' protocol on port '12345'. Both the main data playback (EEG graphs updating) and the network stream must be actively running.
